YESHUNGUANG-A_THOUSAND_FIRST_MEETINGS.de: Whenever you break an enemy's [gold]Block[/gold], play a [gold]Partner[/gold] card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

YESHUNGUANG-BANYUE.description:
[gold]Partner[/gold].[gold]Derive[/gold].
[blue]1：[/blue]Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[blue]2：[/blue]Deal {Damage2:diff()} damage twice.
[blue]3：[/blue]Deal {Damage3:diff()} damage to ALL enemies, apply 2 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold]。

YESHUNGUANG-BREAK_THROUGH.description: Whenever you break an enemy's [gold]Block[/gold], draw {Cards:diff()} cards.

if [gold]Qingming Sowrd Force[/gold] is full, gain {EnlightenedMind:diff()} [pink]Enlightened Mind[/pink].

[gold]Memory[/gold]。

YESHUNGUANG-LOSS_OF_ALL_FIVE_SENSES.sele: Exhaust any number of cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].

[gold]Memory[/gold].
[red]Can only be played while having[/red] [pink]Enlightened Mind[/pink].

|}When gaining [gold]Ether Veil[/gold], gain 1 [gold]Qingming Sword Force[/gold].

[gold]Memory[/gold].

[gold]Memory[/gold].

Deal damage equal to twice the [gold]Frail[/gold] on the target.

YESHUNGUANG-SWORD_SHADOW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage

YESHUNGUANG-SOARING_LIGHT.description:
[gold]Memory[/gold].

YESHUNGUANG-THE_MASTER_OF_QINGMING_SWORD: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.

[gold]Memory[/gold].

YESHUNGUANG-TOUCH_OF_DAWNLIGHT.descripti: Whenever you have [gold]Enlightened Mind[/gold], [gold]Memory[/gold] cards won't gain [gold]Exhaust[/gold], [gold]Partner[/gold] cards gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Reply[/gold].

At the start of your turn, apply {EnemyBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for ALL [red]enemies[/red].

YESHUNGUANG-VERDICT.description:

If [gold]Qingming Sword Force[/gold] is full, gain {Mind:diff()} [pink]Enlightened[/pink].

YESHUNGUANG-WHEN_I_RETURN.description:

|}Whenever you gain [gold]Ether Veil[/gold], gain 1 more.

YESHUNGUANG-WHEN_OLD_DREAMS_RESURFACE.de: Whenever you first [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card each turn, add a copy to your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].

YESHUNGUANG-WISE.description:
[gold]Partner[/gold].
Choose {Cards:diff()} [gold]Partner[/gold] or [gold]Memory[/gold] cards from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

YESHUNGUANG-WHITE_HAIR_FORM.description:

[gold]Enlightened Mind[/gold] no longer be [gold]Removed[/gold] when Energy is 0.
